hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.swift ]]; then if grep -qE "foregroundColor\(|NavigationView|ObservableObject|@Published|cornerRadius\(|DispatchQueue\.main|Timer\.publish" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "DEPRECATED API DETECTED in $FILE. Check banned APIs in CLAUDE.md."; fi; fi'
